text: The board shall select a president, vice president, treasurer, and secretary. The secretary is not required to be a director.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 5
### Chapter 172. Rural Rail Transp. Districts
##### § 172.106 — Officers

The board shall select a president, vice president, treasurer, and secretary. The secretary is not required to be a director.

*Added by Acts 2009, 81st Leg., R.S., Ch. 85 (S.B.1540), Sec. 2.04, eff. April 1, 2011.*

subsections.text: The board shall select a president, vice president, treasurer, and secretary. The secretary is not required to be a director.
